BlackPill
  • Hardware Reference
  • View page source

Hardware Reference

This section covers the low-level communication with the DRO hardware.

DRO Hardware Abstraction Layer

DRO Hardware Abstraction Layer (HAL)

The dro_hal module serves as the primary communication bridge between Python and the AKKON Digital Read Out (DRO) controller. It encapsulates the serial communication protocol and provides a high-level API to access real-time encoder data and device information.

Key Features:

  • Protocol Abstraction: Converts binary data frames from the controller into structured Python dictionaries.

  • Device Discovery: Provides methods to retrieve firmware versions, hardware revisions, and axis configurations.

  • Error Handling: Manages serial interface exceptions and communication disruptions gracefully.

Architecture:

The core of this module is the DROController class. It manages the lifecycle of the serial connection and provides thread-safe access (where implemented) to the controller’s data stream.

Example:

from dro_hal import DROController

# Initialize communication
dro = DROController(port='COM5')

# Retrieve hardware details
info = dro.get_device_info()
print(f"Connected to: {info['Name']} (V{info['FW_Ver']})")

# Read axis positions
axes = dro.read_controller_info()
for i, axis in enumerate(axes):
    print(f"Axis {i}: {axis['Pos']}")
Version:

1.0.0

Author:

Gerhard Burger

Copyright:

2026, Gerhard Burger

License:

MIT

class dro_hal.DROController(port, baudrate=115200, timeout=1)[source]

Bases: object

DRO_DTMOK = 0
DRO_ERR_CRC = -6
DRO_ERR_INVALID_AXIS = -5
DRO_ERR_NOT_ACCEPTED = -2
DRO_ERR_SEND_FAIL = -1
DRO_GET_CONTROLLER_INFO = 1
DRO_GET_DEVICE_INFO = 5
DRO_GET_PARAMS = 11
DRO_GET_R0X_VALUE = 22
DRO_GET_W0X_VALUE = 23
DRO_JUMP_BOOTLOADER = 99
DRO_SET_AXIS_FLAG = 16
DRO_SET_BUZZER_STATE = 10
DRO_SET_CUSTOM_DIVIDER = 9
DRO_SET_DIVIDER_INDEX = 8
DRO_SET_ENCODER_RESOLUTION = 13
DRO_SET_HC05_CONFIG = 24
DRO_SET_NEXT_DIVIDER = 6
DRO_SET_PARAMS = 12
DRO_SET_POSITION_MONITOR_PARAMS = 14
DRO_SET_PREV_DIVIDER = 7
DRO_SET_R0X = 20
DRO_SET_R0X_VALUE = 17
DRO_SET_TRANSMISSION = 3
DRO_SET_W0X_VALUE = 21
DRO_SET_ZERO = 2
DRO_SUCCESS = 0
FMT_CONTROLLER_INFO_REC = '<42s B'
FMT_DEVICE_CONTEXT_INFO = '<BBBBB B 22s 11s'
FMT_DRO_INFO_REC = '<q H B B h'
FMT_POSITION_MONITOR = '<I I'
FMT_TRANSMISSION_PARAMS = '<I I I'
MAX_AXES = 3

CRC-8-ATM Algorithmus

close()[source]
get_device_info()[source]

Abfrage der TDeviceContextInfo

get_w0x_value(axis: int)[source]

Liest den aktuellen W0x-Wert aus

read_controller_info()[source]

Liest alle Achswerte (TControllerInfoRec)

send_receive(cmd: int, payload: bytes = b'', expected_len: int = 0)[source]

Implementiert die SendReceive-Routine mit Startbyte $24 und CRC

set_custom_divider(axis: int, value: int)[source]

Setzt einen benutzerdefinierten Teiler (WORD)

set_divider_index(axis: int, index: int)[source]

Setzt den Teiler-Index

set_transmission(axis: int, num: int, den: int, res: int)[source]

Setzt die Getriebeparameter

set_w0x_value(axis: int, value: int)[source]

Setzt den Werkstueck-Nullpunkt (int64)

set_zero(axis: int)[source]

Setzt die Achse auf Null
